title: populus yatungensis
intro: Populus yatungensis, also known as the Himalayan white poplar, is a deciduous tree species native to the Himalayan region. The bark and leaves of Populus yatungensis are used in traditional medicine due to their anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties, which help treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Populus yatungensis include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the bark and leaves are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
